name: [YAOC2 Skill] Publish — Ghost Blog
_doc: Sub-workflow skill. Creates a draft or published post on Ghost via the Admin API. Input: { title, html, tags[], status?, feature_image_url? }. Output: { status, post_url, result_summary }. Requires GHOST_ADMIN_URL and GHOST_ADMIN_API_KEY in n8n env.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ posts: [{ title: $json.title, html: $json.html, tags: $json.tags, status: $json.status, ...(($json.feature_image_url) ? { feature_image: $json.feature_image_url } : {}) }] }) }}
